nasb.text: and I will give it for a possession along with the sons of Ammon to the sons of the east, so that the sons of Ammon will not be remembered among the nations.

esv.text: I will give it along with the Ammonites to the people of the East as a possession, that the Ammonites may be remembered no more among the nations,

cnv.text: 我必把摩押連同亞捫人一起交給東方人作產業，使亞捫不再在列國中被記念。

ccb.text: 我要将它和亚扪人一起交给东方人统治，使亚扪人从此被列国遗忘。
